positive: Minimalist woodland silhouette art, featuring stylized forest animals and botanical elements like ferns and mushrooms. A central composition of a howling wolf, leaping fox, and gentle deer framed by ornate, curving branches and stylized floral mandalas. Strong negative space and positive space contrast. Designed as a sophisticated, monochromatic line art print on a light background. Style: Neo-geometric engraving mixed with delicate etching. Lighting: Soft, diffused studio light emphasizing crisp linework. Color direction: Deep indigo and black ink on cream parchment. Composition: Symmetrical and balanced, ideal for apparel sublimation print. Vector art quality, high detail, clean linework.
negative: blur, bokeh, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, celebrity, copyrighted, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, oversaturated, messy, grainy, signature
